content: Instead of treating MemoryBank as a passive storage module for AI agents, we can reframe it as an active, curiosity-driven learning agent itself that prioritizes which existing memory fragments to retrieve, refine, and recombine for the host agent, rather than just holding all memories for the host to sort through. This creates a nested agent architecture where the memory system is a curious, active learner aligned to the host agent’s long-term task goals.
